89 
PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 
LABEL: 
Procedure Classification System/Nomenclature 
DESCRIPTION: A code to identify the schema used to categorize providers. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR Taxonomy 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
1 = T-MSIS taxonomy code 
2 = Provider specialty code 
3 = Provider
